tooltip.redstonelink.open_pairing: Sneak with empty offhand, then right-click to open pairing UI
tooltip.redstonelink.trigger_linker: Right-click while standing with empty offhand to trigger linked cores
screen.redstonelink.pairing.title: Redstone Link Pairing
screen.redstonelink.pairing.input_hint: Enter target serial, 0 clears all links
screen.redstonelink.pairing.invalid: Please input a non-negative integer serial
screen.redstonelink.button_pairing.title: triggerSource Link Pairing
screen.redstonelink.button_pairing.inval: Please input one or more positive integer serials
screen.redstonelink.core_pairing.title: Core Link Pairing
screen.redstonelink.pairing.input_toolti: Rule: support N and A:B, use / as separator.
screen.redstonelink.core_pairing.invalid: Please input one or more positive integer serials
message.redstonelink.player_only: [RedstoneLink] This command can only be used by a player.
message.redstonelink.not_pairable: [RedstoneLink] The selected hand is not holding a pairable item.
message.redstonelink.button_source_only: [RedstoneLink] Pairing can only be initiated from triggerSource nodes.
message.redstonelink.link_already_exists: [RedstoneLink] Link already exists; no changes applied.
message.redstonelink.link_not_exists: [RedstoneLink] Link does not exist; cannot remove.
message.redstonelink.set_links.confirm_r: [RedstoneLink] Batch overwrite detected (%s entries). Run again to confirm: /%s
message.redstonelink.link.set.input_too_: [RedstoneLink] link set input is too long; max allowed length is %s characters.
[RedstoneLink] Too many requests. Please try again later.
[RedstoneLink/WriteControl] Write denied because mode is readonly.
message.redstonelink.invalid_target_list: [RedstoneLink] Invalid target list format. Use / separator with N or A:B (e.g. 1:100/1/1000/901:1903/).
message.redstonelink.offline_targets_blo: [RedstoneLink] Offline targets are blocked by config: %s
message.redstonelink.offline_targets_sav: [RedstoneLink] Saved offline targets: %s (not interactable until online).
message.redstonelink.target_not_set: [RedstoneLink] This triggerSource has no linked cores.
message.redstonelink.display.far_overlay: [RedstoneLink/Display] Far overlay render mode set to: %s.
message.redstonelink.audit.summary: [RedstoneLink] Audit - online cores: %s, online triggerSources: %s, total links: %s, links missing online endpoint: %s.
message.redstonelink.retire.confirm: [RedstoneLink] Retire requires confirm: /redstonelink node retire %s %s confirm
message.redstonelink.retire.batch.too_ma: [RedstoneLink] Too many batch retire serials, max %s.
message.redstonelink.retire.batch.confir: [RedstoneLink] Batch retire pending (type=%s, count=%s). Run again to confirm: /%s
message.redstonelink.retire.batch.done: [RedstoneLink] Batch retire done (type=%s, input=%s, changed=%s, node_removed=%s, links_removed=%s).
message.redstonelink.privacy.current_lin: [RedstoneLink/Privacy] Invalid serial (type=%s): %s (must be allocated and not retired).

message.redstonelink.write_control.prote: [RedstoneLink/WriteControl] Invalid protected serial (type=%s): %s (must be allocated and not retired).

[RedstoneLink/WriteControl] Protected entry not found: type=%s, serial=%s.

message.redstonelink.activate.batch.empt: [RedstoneLink] Batch activate source list is empty.
message.redstonelink.activate.batch.no_r: [RedstoneLink] Batch activate reached no targets (sources=%s, linked_sources=%s).
message.redstonelink.activate.batch.summ: [RedstoneLink] Batch activate done (sources=%s, linked_sources=%s, handled_sources=%s, handled_targets=%s, crosschunk_takeovers=%s, mode=%s).
message.redstonelink.place.replace_confi: [RedstoneLink] Detected %s non-air block replacements. Run /redstonelink place confirm to continue.
message.redstonelink.place.volume_exceed: [RedstoneLink] Placement volume is too large (%s), limit is %s.
message.redstonelink.place.chunks_not_lo: [RedstoneLink] Target area includes unloaded chunks. Load them first and retry.
message.redstonelink.place.no_pending: [RedstoneLink] There is no pending placement to confirm.
message.redstonelink.place.pending_expir: [RedstoneLink] Pending placement has expired. Please run the command again.
message.redstonelink.place.pending_dimen: [RedstoneLink] Dimension changed. Pending placement is invalid now.
message.redstonelink.place.dimension_mis: [RedstoneLink] Dimension mismatch. Placement has been cancelled.
message.redstonelink.place.only_pairable: [RedstoneLink] Only pairable node blocks from this mod are supported.
message.redstonelink.crosschunk.invalid_: [RedstoneLink] Type %s is not valid for role %s.
message.redstonelink.crosschunk.type_not: [RedstoneLink] Type %s is blocked for role %s. Allowed: %s.
message.redstonelink.crosschunk.whitelis: [RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Whitelist added: role=%s, type=%s, serial=%s, resident=%s.
[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Whitelist already exists: role=%s, type=%s, serial=%s.
[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Whitelist not found: role=%s, type=%s, serial=%s.
[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Too many whitelist set serials, max %s.
[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Batch whitelist overwrite pending (%s entries). Run again to confirm: /%s
[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Resident flag updated: role=%s, type=%s, serial=%s, resident=%s.

[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Resident saved: role=%s, type=%s, serial=%s is offline, so no force-load while offline; it takes effect after node comes online again (linker serial itself cannot come online).

[RedstoneLink/CrossChunk] Set mode applied: role=%s, type=%s, resident=%s.
